overall_perception_summary.headline: The Brand Diagnostician
overall_perception_summary.description: POKPOK.AI positions itself as the 'House M.D. for Digital Commerce Brands,' a brutally honest diagnostic tool in a world of marketing fluff. It rejects the expensive, slow, and often superficial agency model, offering instead a data-driven 'X-ray' that reveals a brand's 'positioning fractures.' The brand's identity is a fusion of a seasoned strategist and a rebellious hacker, promising enterprise-grade intelligence at indie-founder prices. It's not a creative partner; it's a clinical tool that delivers uncomfortable truths to help brands win.

foundation.title: Democratizing Strategic Truth
foundation.description: The brand's purpose is The Healer, diagnosing and fixing broken brand strategies with clinical precision. Its mission is to be The Democratizer, making enterprise-level strategic intelligence accessible to all founders for a fraction of the traditional cost. The core value is Radical Transparency, promising '100% of The Truth' with 'No B.S.' and 'No Sampling.' This foundation supports its positioning as a Scientific Miracle, delivering a high-tech diagnostic service that feels sterile and authoritative but is priced as a utilitarian tool.

identity.title: Irreverent Clinical Expert
identity.description: The brand's personality is The Reliable Expert, leveraging 25 years of experience but with a cold, confrontational edge. The dominant archetype is The Sage (65%), obsessed with truth and data, supported by The Outlaw's (25%) rebellion against the 'marketing fluff' of the agency world. The visual identity is a stark, Edgy Avant-Garde terminal aesthetic, using ASCII art and monospaced fonts to signal a technical, hacker-like ethos. The tone is a Clinical Authority, but one that isn't afraid to be provocative and use slang to make its point.

communication.title: Diagnosis Over Opinion
communication.description: The messaging hook is The Problem Solver, directly addressing the pain points of DTC founders like 'positioning blindness.' Its USP is The Value Hacker, offering a proprietary diagnostic system and 25 years of expertise for €50, directly contrasting with the €5K+ agency model. Key Selling Points are rooted in Derm-Validation, treating its strategic frameworks and data analysis as clinical proof. The focus is on Science Education, teaching founders how to diagnose their brand rather than just selling a report.

benefits.title: Clarity, Confidence, Competence
benefits.description: Functionally, POKPOK.AI delivers Restoration, fixing 'positioning fractures' and telling brands 'exactly what to rebuild.' The emotional benefit is Intelligence — the feeling of confidence and savvy that comes from making data-driven decisions instead of guessing. Using this service is an act of Self-Expression for The Purist, signaling a belief in data over hype. Socially, it offers entry into The Knowledge Club of 'Truth Seekers,' a tribe of founders who reject the mainstream agency path.

marker_1.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] ORIGIN OF AUTHORITY (The Source of Power)
marker_1.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Healer. The entire brand is built on the metaphor of a doctor diagnosing a patient: 'The House M.D. for Digital Commerce Brands,' 'diagnosing positioning fractures,' 'prescribing cure.' Pass 2: Slider A is 1/5 Pure Clinical. The authority comes from data, scans, and diagnostics ('X-ray your brand,' 'proprietary framework'), not nature. Slider B is 2/5 Restoration. The goal is to fix what's broken ('rebuild content from diagnosis,' 'fix the page'). Grid: Low(1) x Low(2) maps directly to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The medical diagnosis metaphor is consistent and explicit across the site.
marker_1.evidence: "The House M.D. for Digital Commerce Brands" ... "We X-ray your brand across every channel you sell on. By diagnosing positioning fractures in your category, reviews, and pages, we tell you exactly what to rebuild and how." ... "We run diagnostics first, then prescribe."
marker_1.evidence_src: HOME PAGE (headline) + HOME PAGE (body copy) + HOME PAGE (FAQ)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's core metaphor is medical diagnosis. Slider scores for clinical authority and restorative mission align perfectly with The Healer territory.

marker_2.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Democratizers. The mission is explicitly stated as making expensive strategic truth affordable for indie founders. Pass 2: Slider A is 2/5 Optimization. The impact is focused on improving an individual brand's health and performance, not reforming the industry or saving the world. Slider B is 5/5 Democratic. The pricing model (€50 vs €50K) and language ('distribute it at indie-founder prices') are designed for universal access. Grid: Low(2) x High(5) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The mission is a textbook case of democratizing an exclusive service.
marker_2.evidence: "We exist because truth has been too expensive. We distribute it at indie-founder prices." ... "1% Of The Price. 100% Of The Truth." ... "Enterprise-grade intelligence at indie-brand pricing. Not because we're cheap. Because information asymmetry shouldn't be a business model."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The mission to make expensive 'truth' affordable for everyone is the core of the brand's proposition. Sliders for individual brand focus and democratic access confirm this.

marker_3.slider_b_position_name: The Spec Sheet (Exact percentages, pH, sourcing)
marker_3.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Radical Transparency. The brand's values are 'Terminal Honesty,' 'Radical Transparency,' and 'No B.S.' It promises to show all the data. Pass 2: Slider A is 4/5 High-Performance. The value is in the quality and depth of the diagnosis ('100% of reviews,' '50 critical content elements'). Slider B is 1/5 The Spec Sheet. The entire product is about delivering data, evidence, and structured reports ('Receipts, not opinions,' '17 brand perception markers'). Grid: High(4) x High(1) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned. The brand's core values are explicitly about delivering unvarnished, data-backed truth.
marker_3.evidence: "#Terminal Honesty #Radical Transparency #No B.S." ... "NO SAMPLING. NO GUESSING. Frameworks are useful. Real data is better." ... "Receipts, not opinions. Every finding links back to source data."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand explicitly names 'Radical Transparency' as a core value. The sliders confirm a focus on high-performance data delivery and full disclosure.

marker_4.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Medical Authority. The aesthetic is a sterile, technical computer terminal, and the value is framed as a utility ('€50 / report'). Pass 2: Slider A is 1/5 Clinical Sterile. The visual language is based on a command-line interface ('SCANNING...', 'X-RAY v1.0', ASCII art), which is the digital equivalent of a sterile lab. Slider B is 1/5 Bulk Utility. The brand positions its reports as a commodity by contrasting its €50 price with the €5K-€50K agency/enterprise cost, emphasizing radical affordability. Grid: Low(1) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The brand uses a sterile, clinical aesthetic to deliver a utility-priced service, perfectly fitting The Medical Authority.

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's visual identity is a cold, sterile computer terminal, and its value proposition is built on being a radically affordable utility. This combination is a perfect match for The Medical Authority.

marker_5.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Reliable Expert. The brand speaks with extreme authority ('25 years of strategic branding expertise') but in a cold, clinical, and data-driven manner. Pass 2: Slider A is 1/5 Robotic. The tone is devoid of emotion, using terms like 'diagnostics,' 'scan,' 'framework,' and 'data.' It's pure information. Slider B is 5/5 The Deity. The brand presents its methodology as the final word ('The Truth,' 'No negotiation,' 'Receipts, not opinions'), backed by decades of experience. Grid: Low(1) x High(5) maps directly to Territory 3. Pass 3: Aligned. The personality is that of an unquestionable, data-driven authority with no emotional warmth.
marker_5.evidence: "25 years architecting global brands." ... "We don't guess. We run diagnostics first, then prescribe." ... "The output isn't a suggestion. It's a structured evidence report." ... "Five principles. No negotiation."
marker_5.evidence_src: HOME PAGE (body copy) + HOME PAGE (FAQ) + MANIFESTO PAGE

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The combination of extreme, data-driven authority and a complete lack of emotional warmth is the definition of The Reliable Expert.

marker_6.reasoning: The Sage (65%) is the dominant archetype, driven by the relentless pursuit of truth, data, and diagnosis ('Stop guessing. Start knowing,' 'The Truth is expensive. Fight back'). The Outlaw (25%) is a strong secondary, evident in the rebellious stance against the marketing establishment ('NO FUCKING CORPO APPROACH,' 'sick of marketing fluff'). The Ruler (10%) appears as a tertiary accent, expressed through the authoritative control and mastery over data ('We know their digital shelf inside out'). Territory: The Sage is native to Territory 3 (The Philosopher), which aligns with the brand's focus on clarity and principles. The Outlaw adds a disruptive edge, but the core drive is intellectual.
marker_6.evidence: "The Truth is expensive. Fight back" (Sage) ... "Built by people who got sick of marketing fluff and fake-it-till-you-make-it culture." (Outlaw) ... "NO FUCKING CORPO APPROACH." (Outlaw) ... "We know their digital shelf inside out." (Ruler)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: Cross-validation: ToV Territory 1 (Clinical Authority) expects Sage-led or Ruler-led. VI Territory 4 (Edgy Avant-Garde) expects Outlaw-led or Magician-led. The Sage/Outlaw mix perfectly explains the tension between a clinical, truth-seeking voice and a rebellious, edgy visual identity. The primary archetype (Sage) is coherent with the ToV territory.

marker_7.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: A unique blend, but leaning Clinical Authority due to the diagnostic language. Pass 2: Humor is 2/5 Serious. Formality is 4/5 Conversational ('WTF Pokpok?'). Respect is 5/5 Provocative ('NO FUCKING CORPO APPROACH.'). Enthusiasm is 1/5 Clinical ('Diagnostic Complete'). Applying hard rules: Rule 1 (Clinical Authority) fires because Humor <= 2 and Enthusiasm <= 2. The high scores in Formality and Respect are unusual for this territory but don't negate the rule. STOP. Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. Despite the provocative and conversational elements, the core tone is dry, serious, and data-driven, which is the essence of Clinical Authority.
marker_7.evidence: "We X-ray your brand..." (Clinical) ... "WTF Pokpok?" (Conversational) ... "NO FUCKING CORPO APPROACH." (Provocative) ... "System Status: Operational [•] Diagnostic Complete • Prescribing Cure" (Clinical)
marker_7.evidence_src: HOME PAGE (headline) + HOME PAGE (navigation) + MANIFESTO PAGE + HOME PAGE (footer)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The hard rules for Tone of Voice place the brand in Clinical Authority because of its low humor and clinical enthusiasm. The provocative and informal elements are a secondary layer on top of this clinical core.

marker_8.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Edgy Avant-Garde. The described aesthetic is a hacker terminal, which is cold, disruptive, and unconventional. Pass 2: Visual data is unavailable, so scoring is based on textual descriptions. Slider A is 1/5 Sterile. The aesthetic is a cold, digital command-line interface. Slider B is 4/5 Playful. The use of ASCII art, blinking cursors, and a 'terminal' interface is a form of controlled chaos and expressive design, not a simple Swiss grid. Grid: Low(1) x High(4) maps to Territory 4. Pass 3: Aligned. The combination of a cold, sterile color palette with an expressive, unconventional layout is the definition of The Edgy Avant-Garde.
marker_8.evidence_src: HOME PAGE (body copy) + PRODUCT PAGE (body copy)
marker_8.look_and_feel: A retro-futuristic hacker terminal aesthetic, using monospaced fonts, ASCII art, and a dark-mode interface to convey technical prowess and a disruptive ethos.
marker_8.distinctive_asset_4: Blinking cursor and system status motifs
marker_8.distinctive_asset_5: Use of '█' and '▓' block characters for design
marker_8.primary_palette: A stark, high-contrast palette of black, white, and terminal green, evoking a classic command-line interface and hacker culture.

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The textual descriptions of the website's visual design strongly support the scoring. The cold temperature and expressive, unconventional layout are a clear fit for The Edgy Avant-Garde. Data quality is marked as limited due to the missing visual analysis report.

marker_9.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Problem Solver. The messaging is entirely focused on identifying and solving brand problems ('Every brand hits a wall,' 'See where your story breaks'). Pass 2: Slider A is 4/5 The Result. The hook is the outcome of the analysis: 'Find the white space,' 'See where your story breaks. Claim by claim.' Slider B is 2/5 Rational. The persuasion is based on a logical process: analyze data -> diagnose gaps -> treat content. Grid: High(4) x Low(2) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned. The messaging consistently frames the service as a rational solution to specific business problems.
marker_9.evidence: "Every brand hits a wall — at a different stage" ... "See who owns what. Find the white space." ... "See where your story breaks. Claim by claim." ... "Rebuild content from diagnosis. Not guesses."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's messaging is a clear example of The Problem Solver, focusing on rational arguments to deliver a specific result (a diagnosis).

marker_10.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Lab Breakthrough. The story is about experienced professionals building a technical solution. Pass 2: Slider A is 2/5 The Professional. The protagonists are the co-founders, Viktor and George, whose authority comes from their professional experience ('25 years in strategic branding,' '10 years in product & tech'). Slider B is 2/5 Tech-Forward. The setting is the world of tech and data ('automated infrastructure,' 'proprietary LLM before the ChatGPT hype'). Grid: Low(2) x Low(2) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The narrative is a classic story of expert practitioners creating a technological innovation.
marker_10.evidence: "Built by people who got sick of marketing fluff..." ... "Viktor: 25 years architecting global brands." ... "George: 8 years scaling Big Data and Fintech products. Built a proprietary LLM before the ChatGPT hype."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's origin story centers on two professionals with deep expertise who created a technological solution, which is a perfect fit for The Lab Breakthrough narrative.

marker_11.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Derm-Validation (or its B2B equivalent). The proof points are all about the rigor of the analysis and the expertise behind it. Pass 2: Slider A is 2/5 The Lab. The validators are the expert co-founders ('25 years of strategic branding expertise'). Slider B is 1/5 The Graph. The proof is hard data and methodology: '17 BRAND STRATEGY MARKERS,' '1700+ REVIEWS' analyzed, '50 CONTENT ELEMENTS.' Grid: Low(2) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The brand uses its methodology and the founders' expertise as its primary proof, which is the B2B equivalent of clinical validation.
marker_11.evidence: "25 years of strategic marketing experience, distilled into reports." ... "17 BRAND STRATEGY MARKERS" ... "15 TOP CATEGORY PAGES" ... "1700+ REVIEWS"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand validates its claims through its rigorous methodology and the deep expertise of its founders, which functions as a form of clinical or expert validation.

marker_12.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] THE OWNERSHIP CLAIM (What Makes You Unique)
marker_12.slider_b_position_name: The Smart Value (High potency for fair price)
marker_12.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Value Hacker. The entire business model is based on providing an enterprise-level service for a tiny fraction of the price. Pass 2: Slider A is 5/5 The Proprietary System. The USP is the unique methodology ('PokPok.ai methodology,' 'proprietary framework,' 'PokPok Index Engine'). Slider B is 2/5 The Smart Value. The scope is defined by its radical price disruption ('€50' vs '€5K+'), offering high-potency strategic analysis for a fair price. Grid: High(5) x Low(2) maps to Territory 3. Pass 3: Aligned. The brand's unique selling proposition is its proprietary diagnostic system delivered at an unbeatable price point.
marker_12.evidence: "Developed the PokPok.ai methodology to automate the strategic intelligence layer..." ... "Our engine scrapes real shelf data, reviews, competitor pages — then runs them through a proprietary framework." ... "€50 /report" vs "€5K+ THE AGENCY WAY"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The combination of a proprietary, high-tech system and a radically accessible price point is the definition of The Value Hacker.

marker_13.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Science Education. The content is dense with methodology, frameworks, and data points, aiming to educate the user on the science of brand strategy. Pass 2: Slider A is 1/5 The Textbook. The content is filled with diagrams (e.g., 'BROKEN PDP = MONEY LEAKS') and deep explanations of their 17-marker methodology. Slider B is 1/5 The Thesis. The goal is to establish credibility through the rigor of their process ('Proof of Depth. Not Claims.', 'Receipts, not opinions'). Grid: Low(1) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The brand's content focus is almost entirely on educating the user about its scientific and data-driven approach to build trust.
marker_13.evidence: "Three Steps. Three Layers. The Full X-Ray." ... "We decode 15 category leaders across 17 brand strategy markers" ... "AI WITH 17-MARKER METHODOLOGY" ... "Proof of Depth. Not Claims."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The content is overwhelmingly focused on explaining the complex methodology and providing data-based proof, which is a clear fit for Science Education.

marker_14.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Restoration. The service is designed to fix broken brands. Pass 2: Slider A is 5/5 The Fixer. The benefit is explicitly about fixing damage: 'diagnosing positioning fractures,' 'tell you exactly what to rebuild,' 'fix the page.' Slider B is 1/5 Biological. The outcome is about the underlying health of the brand's strategy ('positioning,' 'alignment,' 'gaps'), not its surface-level appearance. Grid: High(5) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The core function of the product is to repair foundational strategic damage in a brand.
marker_14.evidence: "diagnosing positioning fractures" ... "tell you exactly what to rebuild and how." ... "We don't run more ads to fix a broken page. We fix the page." ... "Your brand has Multiple Personality Disorder. Nobody told you."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The language consistently uses metaphors of damage and repair ('fractures,' 'fix,' 'rebuild'), making Restoration the clear functional benefit.

marker_15.slider_b_position_name: Savvy (I feel smart/validated for choosing this)
marker_15.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Intelligence or Confidence. The emotional payoff is feeling smart and in control. Pass 2: Slider A is 2/5 Reassurance. The service addresses founder anxiety ('I have no idea who I'm walking into,' 'I'm guessing which customer pain to solve') and provides the reassurance of data. Slider B is 4/5 Savvy. Choosing POKPOK over a traditional agency is positioned as the smart, validated choice ('OVERTHINK. NOT OVERSPEND.'). Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 2 Confidence. The marker-specific table for Intelligence (T4) requires A=3 or higher. Since A=2, Confidence is the better fit, representing the confidence that comes from making a savvy, reassured choice. Pass 3: Aligned with the grid, if not the initial nuance. Confidence is the outcome of feeling savvy and reassured.
marker_15.evidence: "'I have no idea who I'm walking into.' ... YOUR PAIN diagnosis: Don't know who owns the category language..." ... "Stop guessing. Start knowing." ... "OVERTHINK. NOT OVERSPEND."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The service provides reassurance to anxious founders and makes them feel savvy for choosing a data-driven path. This combination of anxiety relief and external validation leads to the emotional benefit of Confidence.

marker_16.slider_a_position_name: The Smart Choice (because it makes sense)
marker_16.slider_b_position_name: The Insider (Hard to find; if you know, you know)
marker_16.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Purist. Choosing POKPOK is a statement against 'marketing fluff' and in favor of data purity. Pass 2: Slider A is 2/5 The Smart Choice. The motivation is explicitly logical: 'Stop guessing. Start knowing,' 'Frameworks are useful. Real data is better.' Slider B is 4/5 The Insider. The brand positions itself as the choice for founders who are 'in the know' and reject the mainstream agency model. Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 3. Pass 3: Aligned. The user expresses their identity as a data-driven purist who makes smart, insider choices.
marker_16.evidence: "Built by people who got sick of marketing fluff and fake-it-till-you-make-it culture." ... "Stop guessing. Start knowing." ... "Frameworks are useful. Real data is better."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The purchase is framed as a rational choice (Logic) for a discerning, niche audience (Insider) that values truth over hype, which is the essence of The Purist.

marker_17.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Knowledge Club. The brand is building a community of 'Truth Seekers' who are intellectually aligned. Pass 2: Slider A is 4/5 Distinction. Using POKPOK is a way to stand apart from founders who rely on 'agency guesswork' and 'marketing fluff.' Slider B is 4/5 The Club. The brand is actively building a community for enthusiasts with its 'Truth Seekers Club' newsletter. Grid: High(4) x High(4) maps to Territory 4 (Insider Clique) in the default grid, but the explicit focus on knowledge and intelligence ('start knowing') makes Territory 2 a better fit based on the territory descriptions. The social benefit is intellectual superiority, not just exclusivity. I will override to Territory 2. Pass 3: Diverged. The grid points to Insider Clique, but the evidence points more strongly to The Knowledge Club, as the tribe is built around shared intelligence, not just access.
marker_17.evidence: "#JOIN THE <TRUTH SEEKERS CLUB>" ... "Get weekly and monthly intel on the brands flying under the radar today" ... "Stop guessing. Start knowing."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The grid maps High(4) x High(4) to 'The Insider Clique'. However, the brand's community is explicitly built around knowledge and intelligence ('Truth Seekers Club', 'start knowing'), which better aligns with the definition of 'The Knowledge Club'. The social benefit is intellectual, not just exclusive.
